ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)
column_names: Date when the version was created
Unique identifier for each quality metric
Name of the quality metric (e.g., accuracy, precision)
